name: Hearty Whole Grain Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F and oil cookie sheets.
2. Blend the tofu until smooth, then blend in the apple juice.
3. Transfer to a medium-sized mixing bowl and set aside.
4. Sift together the remaining ingredients, except the sesame seeds.
5. Fold the flours and seeds into the tofu mixture.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured board.
7. Roll out dough to 1/2 inch thickness.
8. Cut with a cookie cutter.
9. Bake for 12 minutes. Serve immediately.
